projects_summary: Here are some of my real-world projects that demonstrate my ability to build scalable, user-focused applications using modern technologies.
achievements_summary: My journey from MCA to full-stack development, showcasing consistent growth, practical learning, and real-world problem solving.

projects.title: Consultancy Admission Portal
projects.desc: Full-stack admission management system built with Next.js and Django REST. Supports role-based access (Admin, Student, Employee), application tracking, and payment verification for consultancy workflows.

projects.title: Lifeline – Blood Donor System
projects.desc: Web-based blood donor management platform designed to connect donors and patients during emergencies. Includes donor search, filtering, and planned real-time request system.

projects.title: DevProfile Toolkit
projects.desc: Developer utility platform to analyze GitHub profiles and generate professional README files. Features GitHub analytics, language stats, and markdown-based README builder.

projects.title: Just-Download – Utility Platform
projects.desc: Lightweight and fast web-based download utility focused on simplicity and performance. Provides direct installer downloads with minimal UI and efficient architecture.

projects.title: Taste Of India – Recipe Platform
projects.desc: Full-stack recipe sharing platform where users can explore, submit, and manage recipes. Includes authentication, admin approval system, and community-driven content.

projects.title: My-Dev-Space – Developer Portfolio
projects.desc: Modern developer portfolio built using Astro with custom domain, blog support, and scalable architecture. Designed for performance and personal branding.

projects.title: Mood Tab – Chrome Extension
projects.desc: Mood-based animated Chrome new tab with background videos, quotes, weather, and search history. Built using JavaScript and browser APIs.

achievements.title: Exploring Multi-Backend Development
achievements.desc: Currently working with both Node.js and Django, aiming to strengthen backend understanding and build more structured applications.

achievements.title: Hands-on with MERN & Practical Work
achievements.desc: Worked on MERN stack projects and explored freelancing-style work using AI tools, focusing on solving real problems and improving development workflow.

achievements.title: Building Fundamentals Through Practice
achievements.desc: Improved core development skills by working on projects, understanding APIs, frontend-backend integration, and basic deployment.

achievements.title: Transition After MCA into Development
achievements.desc: Completed MCA and started focusing on web development, moving from academic knowledge to hands-on coding and small project building.
